name: Ground Beef Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Thicken the mixture slightly by combining equal parts flour and butter.
2. Preheat a skillet to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Melt the shortening in the skillet, then brown the ground beef. Add the chopped onion and sauté lightly.
4. Reduce the heat to 225 degrees Fahrenheit. Dissolve the chicken bouillon cube in water, then add it along with the condensed chicken gumbo soup, salt, and pepper.
5. Cover and cook until the desired consistency is reached. Serve hot on toasted buns or over rice.
